initiatives.title: Standardize Change Templates and SoD
initiatives.description: Jira templates with required fields (risk, test evidence, backout steps). Enforce separation of duties via workflow gates.

initiatives.title: Golden Hour IR Playbook + Roles
initiatives.description: Define Incident Manager and Comms Lead roles; create 30-minute status cadence and customer message templates.

initiatives.title: Certificate Monitoring and Auto-Renew
initiatives.description: Add expiry alerts at 30/15/7 days and automate renewals where supported.

initiatives.title: Tier 0 Canary + Auto-Rollback
initiatives.description: Implement canary deploys with automated rollback on SLO breaches for Tier 0 services.

initiatives.title: Runbook Refresh and Service Ownership Map
initiatives.description: Update runbooks quarterly; complete service ownership catalog; link to on-call rotations.

initiatives.title: Change Risk Scoring
initiatives.description: Risk score based on tier, blast radius, and rollback readiness; gate high-risk changes for Security review.

initiatives.title: Monthly Live-Fire Drills
initiatives.description: Drills for Tier 0/1 services with documented outcomes and action items.

initiatives.title: Immutable Approval Ledger
initiatives.description: Append-only audit log for change approvals and deploys; integrates with Jira and CI/CD.
